name: Aishah Sofey
description:
French-Canadian Instagram model known for posting lifestyle content. Her posts are often fitness related and highlight new outfits. She has amasssed more than 1.5 million followers on her aishahsofey account. 

She joined Twitter in 2018.

She has collaborated with friends. One of her most popular posts is a series of photos taken on a trip to Greece. It has accumulated over 100,000 likes.

She has Filipina heritage.
creator: theBite123
